keyEvents.text: Goal!  Cayman Islands 1, US Virgin Islands 0. Elijah Seymour (Cayman Islands) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Zachary Scott.
Jordan Bonilla (Cayman Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, US Virgin Islands. Kersan Marcellin replaces Orion Mills.
Substitution, US Virgin Islands. Raejae Joseph replaces Kidaniel Perez.

Goal!  Cayman Islands 2, US Virgin Islands 0. Christopher Reeves (Cayman Islands) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Zachary Scott with a through ball   following a fast break.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Trey Ebanks replaces Alexander Clarke-Ramírez because of an injury.
Kassall Greene (US Virgin Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, US Virgin Islands. Rakeem Joseph replaces James Mack.
Substitution, US Virgin Islands. Zahmyre Harris replaces Kassall Greene.
Dylan Ramos (US Virgin Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Rashaad Powery replaces Zachary Scott.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Romario Dixon replaces Elijah Seymour.
Jett Blaschka (US Virgin Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Goal!  Cayman Islands 2, US Virgin Islands 1. Rakeem Joseph (US Virgin Islands) header from very close range to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Raejae Joseph with a cross   following a corner.
Christopher Reeves (Cayman Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, US Virgin Islands. Jair Whyte replaces Lionel Brown.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Anthony Nelson replaces Christopher Reeves.
Anthony Nelson (Cayman Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Rakeem Joseph (US Virgin Islands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
